title: genista baetica subsp. pumila
intro: Genista baetica subsp. pumila, also known as Dwarf Spanish broom, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula. Its medicinal properties lie in its rich content of flavonoids and saponins, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Genista baetica subsp. pumila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, protecting cells from damage. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote digestive health and reduce stress levels.
